analysis.analysis_title: Synchronized Hardware-Registered VIS-NIR Imaging Spectroscopy and 3D Sensing on a Fresco by Botticelli
analysis.notes: Synchronized sensing technique for the analysis of painted surfaces of frescos. The performance of Visible-Near Infrared (VIS-NIR) Reflectance Imaging Spectroscopy (RIS) synchronized with three-dimensional (3D) acquisition is demonstrated in the study of a detached mural painting by Alessandro Botticelli. Synchronized sensing generates georeferenced data for simplified data treatment and interpretation.

place.place_name: Opificio delle Pietre Dure, Firenze, Italia

agent.n: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

agent.institution: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

method.method_notes: Multispectral/Hyperspectral (MS/HS) reflectance imaging spectroscopy (RIS) exploiting the property of IR radiation to penetrate pictorial layers, revealing properties and composition of the probed matter.
3D acquisition using a laser distance sensor (triangulation meter) to retrieve the surface topography, synchronized with the VIS-NIR scanning.

device.device_name: INO-CNR VIS-NIR Multispectral Scanner with 3D Sensing
device.model: Custom-built multispectral scanner (32 bands, 380-2500 nm) with synchronized 3D triangulation sensor

current_owner.n: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

component.model: 19 Si (380-1000 nm) and 12 InGaAs (1050-2500 nm) photodiodes
component.current_owner: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)
National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

component.model: Two orthogonally mounted XY stages (1000 mm run) and one Z stage (100 mm run)
component.current_owner: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

component.model: Two low-voltage current-stabilized halogen lamps and two narrow-spot white LEDs
component.current_owner: National Institute of Optics of the National Research Council of Italy (INO-CNR)

software.software_notes: Custom software for synchronizing the XY(Z) scanning system, the triangulation distance meter (autofocus), and the acquisition of the spectral reflectance image.

setting_values.setting_value: Pixel Size (Spatial Resolution): 0.25 mm x 0.25 mm
Acquisition Rate: approx. 3 hours per square meter

dataset.dataset_title: Synchronized Hardware-Registered VIS-NIR Imaging Spectroscopy and 3D Sensing on a Fresco by Botticelli
